products.title: LG 9 Kg 5 Star AI Direct Drive Front Load Washing Machine (FHP1209Z5M)
products.short_description: LG 9 Kg fully automatic front load washing machine with AI Direct Drive, Steam wash, Wi-Fi connectivity, and 5-star energy rating—perfect for large families.
products.long_description:
The LG 9 Kg AI Direct Drive Front Load Washing Machine is designed for modern households that demand efficiency, performance, and smart features. Powered by AI DD technology, it intelligently detects fabric type and weight to provide optimized washing care.

With Steam technology, it removes up to 99.9% allergens, making it ideal for families with kids or sensitive skin. The 6 Motion Direct Drive system ensures deep cleaning while being gentle on clothes.

This washing machine comes with Wi-Fi connectivity via LG ThinQ, allowing you to control and monitor your laundry remotely. Its 5-star energy rating ensures low electricity consumption, saving on monthly bills.

The 1200 RPM spin speed helps in faster drying, while 14 wash programs provide flexibility for different fabric types. Built with a stainless steel drum, it ensures durability and hygiene over long-term usage.

Overall, it is a feature-rich, energy-efficient washing machine offering great value for money in the premium mid-range segment.
highlights: 9 Kg capacity ideal for large families
Wi-Fi enabled with LG ThinQ app

positive: Very good wash quality and performance
Value for money for features offered
